ItacPersonItem.Notes: Founder of the Accademia della Traccia. In 1678 he joined the Ricovrati, where he was also `censore sopra le stampe` in 1679-80. Pseudonym according to Melzi, I, p. 416. A biography online is at www.francescoredi.it (ed. Walter Bernardi).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
